findings: README and SKILL aligned on core collab bus: filesystem IPC with queue/claimed/results
Directory structure inconsistent: README creates {queue,claimed,results,logs}, SKILL defines {queue,claimed,results,logs,pids,scripts}
Atomic operations documented unevenly: README has mv claim and .tmp-mv in main flow, SKILL only in landmine table
Gap: SKILL documents pids/ for liveness, README omits it - operators could miss recovery dirs
propose->review->improve->consensus flow NOT documented as collab-bus protocol in either file
